description: Letter in Ladino dated September 1777 (Elul 5537), from Yiṣḥaq Sigan or Bigan (?) in Alexandria to [address torn] in Rashid. Among the individuals mentioned in the letter are: Eliyyahu Romano (l.4), Moshe Bibas (l.16), Yiṣḥaq Crespin (l.16). In line 23 a quantity of "cotton/אלגודון" is recorded with the unit "onsas/אונסאס". MCD.
description_he: מכתב בLadino מאלכסנדריה ל-Rosetta. מוחזק בכיא פריז.
